programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a birthday surprise for her friend, whipping up an Italian seafood salad and German chocolate cupcakes

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining home-bakers must steel themselves to face the full force of Paul Hollywoods discerning eye as bread week arrives. For the signature bake, the contestants are given an hour-and-a-half to prepare quick breads with no proving - which results in creative flavours such as sweet chocolate loaves and manchego and prosciutto-stuffed bread coming to the fore. Next up is the technical challenge, in which Paul lulls the bakers into a false sense of security by asking them to make baguettes, a relatively simple task that concludes with the male judge delivering one of his most brutal verdicts yet. Finally, a bicycle, a snake, a lion and even Brighton Pavilion find their way into the tents ovens as the showstopper challenge sees the competitors crafting edible 3D bread sculptures

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins usher the nine remaining home-bakers back into the tent for the fourth week of the contest. This time, the competitors must tackle desserts, beginning with a signature challenge in the form of a French classic - creme brulees. With the clock ticking, the contestants must grill their offerings to perfection to avoid serving up an unappetising scrambled egg and custard soup. Next up is the technical challenge, in which Mary Berry asks the group to prepare Spanische Windtorte, an Austrian meringue inspired by the tastes of Spain, Switzerland and France. Finally, the showstopper this week involves baking a three-tiered cheesecake stack, and only the most structurally sound creations will be worthy of securing their maker the title of star baker

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James joins up with fellow chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen to explore Whitby, in James home county of North Yorkshire. James pops into his favourite fish and chip shop before cooking tikka mackerel buns with fennel and apple salad for the crowds at Whitby bandstand. Lisa, meanwhile, pays a visit to Michelin-starred restaurant The Black Swan, to see how its huge kitchen garden provides almost all of the produce used in the kitchen

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James is joined by chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen in Lancashire, where they visit a food hall and a brewery in Clitheroe, as well Lisas Michelin-starred restaurant Northcote in the village of Langho. Along the way they prepare barbecued John Dory with kohlrabi and fennel salad, Blackburn and Eccles cakes with a selection of cheeses and a classic lamb hot pot

Sci-fi thriller, starring Vincent Ventresca, Summer Glau, Tom Skerritt and Cole Williams

programme.title: Gold (2016)
programme.desc: A prospector desperate for a lucky break, teams up with a similarly eager geologist and sets off on a journey to find gold in a remote Indonesian jungle. However, as the risky expedition begins without a single speck of gold or the promise of it on the horizon, disease and failure begins to threaten the short-lived dream. Thriller, with Matthew McConaughey, Edgar Ramírez and Bryce Dallas Howard

programme.title: Dead Man Running (2009)
programme.desc: Reformed ex-convict Nick races against time to gather £100,000 to repay a loan shark before his mother is killed. Aided by his best friend Bing, he embarks on a series of increasingly desperate scams to collect the money before it is too late. Crime thriller, starring Tamer Hassan, Danny Dyer, Curtis 50 Cent Jackson, Monet Mazur, Brenda Blethyn and Blake Ritson

programme.title: Born to Raise Hell (2010)
programme.desc: An Interpol agent investigating a gang of Russian gun smugglers gets caught up in a shoot-out that leaves his partner dead. Swearing vengeance, he goes on the rampage through the Eastern European underworld to track down the gang members and carry out his own brand of justice. Action thriller, starring Steven Seagal and Dan Badarau

programme.title: Red (2008)
programme.desc: Elderly, reclusive widower Avery Ludlow is left distraught when his only companion in life - a 14-year-old dog named Red - is murdered by three teenagers. After tracking the youths down, Avery demands the parents take action against the youths but after being turned away, he decides to dish out justice by any means necessary. Thriller, starring Brian Cox, Noel Fisher, Tom Sizemore and Kyle Gallner

programme.desc: A Mexican-American cowboy swears revenge on the bandit chieftain whose female accomplice and lover stole his prize Appaloosa stallion and ended his dream of owning a stud farm. A foray into the bandit camp leads to his humiliation and torture, until a final arm-wrestling duel with the leader offers a chance of survival. Western, with Marlon Brando, John Saxon, Anjanette Comer and Emilio Fernandez

programme.title: Star Trek

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A woman seeks Vincents help after the aliens give her synthetic emotions which drive her to commit murder. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: T.J. Hooker

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A high school principal suspects a teacher of being involved in drug dealing after witnessing an exchange between him and a student

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles (2011)
programme.desc: The Earth is bombarded by what appear to be meteors, but turn out to be the vanguard of an alien invasion force. As Americas west coast comes under heavy attack, a platoon of soldiers is sent in to fight off the aliens and rescue civilians - but the troops have only a few hours to complete their mission before the area is bombed. Sci-fi thriller, with Aaron Eckhart and Ramon Rodriguez

programme.title: The Eiger Sanction (1975)
programme.desc: An art professor who once worked as an assassin is blackmailed into returning to his old career to eliminate a spy. However, his target is in the middle of a mountaineering expedition, forcing the hitman to embark on a perilous climb up the Eiger in hot pursuit. Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With George Kennedy, Jack Cassidy and Vonetta McGee

programme.title: We Still Kill the Old Way (2014)
programme.desc: A former gangster returns to London after 30 years living in exile in Spain when he receives word of his brothers murder. Angered by the brutality of a new generation of criminals who have taken over his territory, he gets his old partners in crime back together to avenge his sibling and restore order to the streets. Gangster drama, starring Ian Ogilvy and Alison Doody

programme.title: Death Race 2000 (1975)
programme.desc: A totalitarian regime keeps the people of a dystopian future America placated with a violent spectacle - a cross country race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians, with points awarded for the most brutal kills. However, a revolutionary leader plans to sabotage the barbaric event by smuggling her daughter in as one of the navigators. Satirical sci-fi thriller, starring David Carradine, Sylvester Stallone and Simone Griffeth.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: On a busy Saturday night at Kings College Hospital, staff have to juggle the needs of elderly patients and sick children alongside those who are drunk or violent. Paramedics bring 12-year-old Grace into resus after she falls down a flight of stairs, while Sarah and Andy are concerned for their 10-month-old son Dexter, who has a high temperature and is unresponsive. Elsewhere, clinical site manager Gordon has a series of tests as a result of senior sister Jen noticing his bloodshot eye

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, the heli-medics are dispatched to a motocross track where Mike has come off his bike, falling over 10 feet, and is experiencing altered sensations in both legs. In another motorcycle accident, Luke suffers a serious femur fracture and a piece of his bone is lying on the road. Near Kendal, Moon has a tonic-clonic seizure and theres drama on the ambulance journey to hospital

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw head to Stockport to take on a 1994 Vauxhall Cavalier Turbo owned by Darren, who is unable to move from the neck down after an accident. With the car gathering dust on the drive, Darrens friends are hoping Fuzz and Tim can convert it to allow him to be a passenger and satisfy his need for speed again

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Bath, Kirstie Allsopp meets first time buyers Laura and Phil, who are desperate to make the move from shared living to a home of their own. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer goes property searching with downsizing duo Kerrie and Dave, who sold their beloved barn conversion to move closer to their kids

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer return to find out how some of the families they have helped are getting on since they decided whether to redesign their problematic homes or sell up and move on. They begin with Paul and Dawn from the first edition back in April 2015, who were at loggerheads over what to do with their detached country home. Its isolated location on the outskirts of Huddersfield made it perfect for astronomy fanatic Paul, but Dawn was desperate to move, hating its dysfunctional layout

programme.title: Great Estates from Above
programme.desc: This episode explores the 10,000-acre Castle Howard Estate in Yorkshire as it races to complete a massive renovation ahead of its spring opening to the public. The Howard family and their team of dedicated staff and volunteers work to transform the historic interiors while, outside, a 440-acre rewilding project is underway and a herd of goats do their bit to conserve the land

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schizophrenic Graham, 75, is brought to Kings College Hospital after being stabbed in the neck by a stranger on his doorstep, and needs a CT scan to reveal the extent of his wound. Former nursery nurse Pat, 89, also arrives on the ward, having been found at the bottom of the stairs at home with no recollection of how she got there, while palliative care nurse Tracey treats 72-year-old retired postman Michael, who was recently diagnosed with lung cancer

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Medics at Kings College Hospital treat 79-year-old Arthur, who has been brought into resus with acute stomach discomfort and has several underlying conditions that could be to blame. Meanwhile, 20-year-old wine merchant Tom is rushed into AandE after collapsing with sharp chest pains and breathing difficulties, and retired soldier Rockey is concerned about his blurred vision

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance crews race to help a teenage motorcyclist who has been hit by a car and catapulted into the air - suffering multiple fractures to his legs and arms. On holiday in Cumbria, a man collapses while working out and his stepdaughter performs CPR to try to keep him alive. A driver suffers a nasty leg wound after being hit from behind on the M40 - and to make matters worse, he is trapped in his lorry

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schizophrenic Graham, 75, is brought to Kings College Hospital after being stabbed in the neck by a stranger on his doorstep, and needs a CT scan to reveal the extent of his wound. Former nursery nurse Pat, 89, also arrives on the ward, having been found at the bottom of the stairs at home with no recollection of how she got there, while palliative care nurse Tracey treats 72-year-old retired postman Michael, who was recently diagnosed with lung cancer

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: On a busy Saturday night at Kings College Hospital, staff have to juggle the needs of elderly patients and sick children alongside those who are drunk or violent. Paramedics bring 12-year-old Grace into resus after she falls down a flight of stairs, while Sarah and Andy are concerned for their 10-month-old son Dexter, who has a high temperature and is unresponsive. Elsewhere, clinical site manager Gordon has a series of tests as a result of senior sister Jen noticing his bloodshot eye

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their North Yorkshire tour the campers visit Masons Campsite near Skipton for an exhilarating stay involving river swimming, trout fishing, cricket and croissants

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT architect Anna hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from in and around Cardiff, hoping to impress her guests with a culinary journey celebrating classic British cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day two in Cardiff, accountant Charlotte is going all out to impress and has spent the cash on a menu of luxury ingredients in her bid to scoop the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beautician Claire hosts the third dinner party in Cardiff, but her decision to serve her favourite dishes on planks instead of plates proves controversial

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time football referee Scott serves up a menu of family favourites in Cardiff, but might have scored an own goal by putting cheese in every course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night in Cardiff sees restaurateur Giovanni cook a menu from his native Italy as he bids to wow guests Anna, Charlotte, Scott and Claire - and scoop the £1,000 prize. Giovanni knows his arch-rival Charlotte is looking for payback after he criticised her night earlier in the week, but when the others spy his massive and complex dishes, they wonder if hes tried too hard to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Unicorn Inn in Ludlow, Shropshire, where husband and wife team Lee and Zoe Osbourne hope their glamorous fairy-tale style rooms will impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the East Walls Hotel in Chichester, West Sussex, owned by history-loving husband and wife Celia and Damon Haughey, who have rejected the boutique label

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Wheatsheaf in Sandbach, Cheshire, where owner Jake Pare and general manager Chris Baldwin hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Shawries Hotel in Blackpool, where fun-loving Allison and Dave Shaw want their guests to feel like part of the family. The dated decor takes Jake and Chris back to their childhood, but Celia and Damon arent fans of the 1980s look or the kiss-me-quick-style Blackpool break. Breakfast is a bargain build-your-own buttie platter, followed by feedback that leaves the competition wide open

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. East Walls Hotel is first up, and owners Celia and Damon need to clean up Daves toilet brush troubles before broaching his beef with the breakfast banger

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend take on their 100th motor - a 1978 MGB GT, their first electric conversion. The car used to belong to family man Jeff. When Jeff died, he left his unfinished MG project to his daughter Caroline, who promised her father she would complete the restoration. Can the team help Caroline fulfil her fathers dying wish?

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw continue their mission to rescue classic cars for their deserving owners. Here, the boys take on a rundown Renault Alpine GTA belonging to David, a former computer technician suffering with ill-health

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jacinta and Marco, who have outgrown their home in Didsbury, Greater Manchester, while Phil Spencer assists newly engaged Olivia and Amy, who want to settle back in the North after five years on the move

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Keeley and Terence in Woodford in London who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Keeley feels that their current family home is no longer suitable for their family of five and longs for a larger property, but Terence loves the location of their house and thinks that renovating it would be a better option

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Professional make-up artist Zara and her partner Giuliano from Reading take a leap of faith as they build the 400-square-metre malthouse-inspired home of their dreams in the Lincolnshire Wolds. Giuliano, who works in tech, faces the challenge of a lifetime as he manages the project with no building experience and its not long before the pair run into difficulties that force them to get far more involved than they ever anticipated

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff of Kings College Hospital treat patients involved in traffic accidents. Jade from Kent is brought in after being hit by a car and knocked under a bus on her way to school, and doctors are concerned the 12-year-old may have fractured her skull. Meanwhile, Geraldine, 60, has been injured while trying to cross the road, and after recently being released from prison 40-year-old Brian is in minors with a broken ankle, but the swelling means his electronic curfew tag will have to be removed

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics rush to help a man who has a single penetrating wound in his back, but who doesnt know if hes been shot or stabbed. Cyclist Thomas is knocked off his bike and the medics perform roadside surgery in a bid to save his life. Dean has been hit by a high-speed motorbike while changing a car tyre and remains remarkably calm while stuck under a wobbly vehicle

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a range of cases including a man who wraps his pick-up truck around a tree, a man who is having severe chest pain that could be a sign of a heart attack and a 103-year-old who has had a fall. Plus, a grandmother who may have a bleed on the brain and a mother with heart failure seek urgent medical treatment

programme.title: Drain the Oceans

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Findings on isolated islands include a volcanic isle with a dark past, elaborate burial rituals, an ancient analogue computer, and clashes between orcas and great white sharks

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: How Nazi Germany fostered air clubs to gain aerial supremacy, in violation of the Treaty of Versailles

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The programme focuses on the tragic events of September 1961, when a Douglas DC-6 operated by Transair Sweden, carrying Dag Hammarskjold, the second Secretary-General of the United Nations, crashed en route to cease-fire negotiations in Northern Rhodesia during the Congo Crisis. All 16 passengers and crew members were killed.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: Documenting the extraordinary defences and kill zones that surrounded Hitlers bunker in Berlin, which was a subterranean safehouse protected with 13ft-thick walls to keep the fuhrer safe from any attack the allies could throw at him from the air

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend tackle their first motorbike, a 1973 Triumph Bonneville motorbike belonging to ex-postmaster Ian, for an emotional reveal in the heart of Wales

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend pick up Andrews 1971 Triumph GT6, a classic British two-seater sports car. This sleek coupe, with its powerful straight-six, two-litre engine, was Triumphs answer to its rivals MGB GT, and is now a desirable classic. However, with petrol-head Andrew struggling with the effects of Marfan syndrome, restoring his own vehicle is now impossible so Tim and Fuzz step in to save the day

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: A Labrador has his first day as a drug sniffer, the managers see if they can smuggle a fake bomb past their screening teams, and Annie faces her moment of truth

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: How a pilot saved the day when he lost all the engines of the aircraft after flying through a thunderstorm 3,000ft above the Gulf of Mexico

programme.title: Planes that Changed History
programme.desc: After beating out the USA and Soviet Union in a high-stakes international race to achieve supersonic air travel, Concorde left its mark on history

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures: Battle Ready
programme.desc: A look at the importance of Panzers in Hitlers conquest of Poland and France, and how the armoured vehicles finally met their match when they took on the Soviet Unions T-34 tanks

programme.title: Hitlers Death Squad
programme.desc: The story of the Nazi soldiers that were charged with carrying out Hitlers plans for genocide, committing some of historys most horrific crimes

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler

programme.title: Lords of War

programme.desc: With access to the first nationwide survey and state-of-the-art drones mapping the Great Wall of China, this documentary offers new evidence that reveals its extraordinary magnitude, rewrites its millennia-long history and decodes its complex signals system. Using cutting-edge chemistry, the programme also finds out what has kept the wall standing for so long - a simple cooking ingredient found in kitchens across the world

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.desc: Maiya May visits the Isle de Jean Charles, Louisiana, one of the first communities in the United States to undergo a federally funded relocation due to climate change. She also learns about hurricanes from the Hurricane Hunters

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: A World Without War - May to December 1945
programme.desc: The final stages of the Second World War in the Far East as the Japanese rulers refused to concede defeat despite the agony of their people, culminating in the dropping of the atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki. With the conflict finally at an end, hundreds of thousands of servicemen were able to return home - where they had to learn to live without the structures of military life

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and James Braxtons penultimate leg takes them to Lowestoft and Cromer. Along the way, Izzie is charmed by a snake and an art deco necklace, while James goes crabbing and gets all fired up by a cannonball. But who will come out on top at auction in Banbury?

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Amanda Middleditch and Julie Tatchell mend a beloved soft toy owl, a gift to Judith Holliman from her much-loved grandmother who helped to raise her. Plus, David Burville fixes a miniature piano and Steve Fletcher sets to work on a wall clock. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: Irita discovers a haul of china, collected by a Lincolnshire builder. She then sells inherited treasures to help a woman fund a new set of wheels

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present the stories of two women trying to find birth parents after half a century apart. Ann Melbourne found her birth mother over a decade ago and now wants to locate her birth father Leslie, who she has limited information about in her adoption paperwork, while Amanda Village is searching for her mother Susan, who gave her up for adoption

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present the stories of a womans quest to discover her identity, and another searching for the sister she always wanted. Paula Stillie has always looked completely different from her white adoptive family in Scotland and her search for her birth family leads across the globe, while Lisa Harding tries to fulfil her mothers dying wish and find the older sister who was given up for adoption before Lisa was born

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus finds an old painting that could be worth a fortune and uncovers a pair of designer bondage boots that whip up a frenzy at auction

programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus Ashworth and his team help Strictly Come Dancing judge Craig Revel Horwood and broadcaster John Sergeant clear their homes of clutter

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Mark Hill take a tour of the Highlands. A rare piece of glass and a penny bank go under the gavel, and one of Scotlands strongest men helps the pair on their way

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Minnie Drivers parents were not married, but all the time they were together her father had a wife and another family. The actress didnt know this until she was older, and now she embarks on a quest to learn more about her dads background. She begins by discovering he was awarded a medal for his role in the Battle of Heligoland Bight during the Second World War - but why did he throw it away? Minnies trail to unravel the mystery leads her to relatives she never knew existed, as well as a kindred spirit

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Revisiting seven of the programmes most extraordinary searchers to discover how their lives have been transformed since finding their missing relatives. The first episode catches up with Joselyn Taylor, who had been searching for her brother James for over 20 years, and Roy Sibblies, who was looking for his birth mother after discovering at 18 that he was adopted

programme.desc: Arusha Irvine and Angus Ashworth tour the country lanes of Northern Ireland in their Rolls-Royce. Angus has designs on a piece of Victorian furniture while Roo hits the dance floor

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Cousins David Williams and Jeffrey Lawrence arrive at the barn with a banjo that has been in their music-loving family for over 120 years, and is crying out for the skills of luthier Julyan Wallis to bring it back to its former glory. Other items seeking some much-needed attention include a speedway champions racing bib and a fairy-tale rag doll. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: Eager collectors zoom in on a rare scientific showpiece. Plus, grieving sisters sell a Swiss clock that leaves the auction room in shock

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: An extraordinary search on behalf of Kate Brown from Portsmouth takes on twists and turns and unveils one missing relative after another. Kate Brown with a foster family and the closest thing she had to a blood relative was her foster brother John, who she was very close to, but while Kate was eventually adopted by the foster family, John was sent back to the care system. programme.title: Dolores@70
programme.desc: Feature length special docu-music programme, recreating the magic and mystery of Dolores Keanes music and the Keane family

programme.title: Born That Way
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Patrick Lydon, through interviews with him in his final year. Patrick reflects on a life that took him from a a budding career in rock journalism in America to trailblazing, with his wife, Gladys, the development in Ireland of the radically inclusive Camphill Movement. His story calls forth the story of Camphill itself and articulates an approach to life that struggles for survival in todays consumerist climate

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: Hospitality experts the Brennans are in Co Donegal, where builder and developer Pat Boyle, his Chicago-based businessman cousin Kevin Boyle and local hotel manager Martina Rafferty have called in the brothers to help bring Sweeneys Hotel on Dungloes Main Street back to life

programme.title: RFDS: Royal Flying Doctor Service
programme.desc: Its Christmas in the outback, and Wayne, Mira and Matty swap red dirt for white sand while attending a jet ski accident

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma decides its time to start focusing on herself and her career so she joins a stand-up comedy course run by her old acting teacher Ian, who is now a comedian and global star after one of his videos went viral. Meanwhile, Joan receives news that her mother Alice has died and her estranged siblings gather to plan the funeral. Guest starring Steve Pemberton and Julie Hesmondhalgh

programme.title: Spent
programme.desc: Mia reluctantly steps up as guardian for Ella when Chrissy is taken ill, but inadvertently promises her a birthday party, one that will double up as a reunion with her birth mother. Broke and alone, Mia rekindles things with David just as a surprise windfall lands in her lap, but money doesnt necessarily help

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Live International Football
programme.sub-title: Republic of Ireland v North Macedonia
programme.desc: Republic of Ireland v North Macedonia (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the friendly, held at Aviva Stadium. Both these sides were eliminated at the semi-final stage of the FIFA World Cup play-offs last Thursday, losing out to Czechia and Denmark respectively and will now each be looking for a morale-boosting victory

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: Learning how poorly Parisian society thinks of her, the queen adjusts her appearance, while Jeannes scheme hits some snags. Drama, starring Emilia Schule and Freya Mavor

programme.title: Greys Anatomy
programme.desc: Addison Montgomery returns to Grey Sloan, seeking help for a patient with a neurological condition, while Bailey accompanies Owen and Blue on a paramedic ride-along

programme.title: Line of Duty
programme.desc: As AC-12 struggle to deal with the repercussions of tragic events, Hastings makes one final bid to uncover institutionalised corruption before his time runs out. Crime drama, starring Adrian Dunbar

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Remi and Sonny go head-to-head, and Holden wont take no for an answer

programme.title: Foxes: Their Secret World
programme.desc: Part two of two. Steve Backshall takes another look at fox behaviour, watching the seven cubs cameras have been following since they were days old as they battle to establish their hierarchy. He also finds out how foxes communicate through their many vocal sounds, from power struggles to a good old chinwag. Cameras also reveal how male dog foxes rival each other as one moves into an already established patch

programme.title: Kerry: Tides of Time
programme.desc: Part two of two. The story of a single year, as the seasons play out through and across the countys varied habitats. This programme looks in detail at the lives of some of the areas most charismatic and fascinating wild inhabitants. Badgers, red deer, hen harrier and puffins are among the cast of characters whose lives are followed through the year

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow (2004)
programme.desc: A climatologist warns global warming will soon result in destructive freak weather, or even another ice age. He thinks the world still has time to prepare for the worst, but the crisis happens almost immediately - and as storms, earthquakes and hurricanes strike in terrifying fashion, he races across America to rescue his son from a frozen New York. Disaster thriller, with Jake Gyllenhaal and Dennis Quaid

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: The final episode of the series is devoted to the return of one of Irelands most resonant international voices, singer-songwriter Dermot Kennedy

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr embark on their first ever Spanish renovation job. Hoping to breathe new life into one of Andalusias forgotten villages, Amanda takes a gamble on a run-down three-storey townhouse and convinces Alan to help her to transform it into a boutique BandB. In a bid to push their DIY skills to a whole new level, the pair visit Granadas architectural marvel and the pinnacle of Moorish design - the Alhambra Palace. However, with over 2,000 square feet to contend with, a roof in need of repair and a crumbling outbuilding on its last legs, it seems they may be in over their heads

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr set about designing a Spanish dining room and foyer. Alans dreams of a lavish reception area are soon quashed when Amanda suggests his special space should be a cupboard under the stairs. To get some impressive design inspiration, the duo head to the outskirts of Vejer to a boutique hotel filled with local salvaged treasures. Amanda also visits the largest reclamation yard in Andalusia to upcycle an old Spanish door into a statement dining table, but Alan fears she may have taken her upcycling too far and is bluntly honest with his friend

programme.title: Line of Duty
programme.desc: As AC-12 struggle to deal with the repercussions of tragic events, Hastings makes one final bid to uncover institutionalised corruption before his time runs out. Crime drama, starring Adrian Dunbar

programme.title: Van Der Valk
programme.desc: The investigation continues after a whistleblower is murdered, as the team are offered a chance to work with the head of the criminal empire to find the killer

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr embark on their first ever Spanish renovation job. Hoping to breathe new life into one of Andalusias forgotten villages, Amanda takes a gamble on a run-down three-storey townhouse and convinces Alan to help her to transform it into a boutique BandB. In a bid to push their DIY skills to a whole new level, the pair visit Granadas architectural marvel and the pinnacle of Moorish design - the Alhambra Palace. However, with over 2,000 square feet to contend with, a roof in need of repair and a crumbling outbuilding on its last legs, it seems they may be in over their heads

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr set about designing a Spanish dining room and foyer. Alans dreams of a lavish reception area are soon quashed when Amanda suggests his special space should be a cupboard under the stairs. To get some impressive design inspiration, the duo head to the outskirts of Vejer to a boutique hotel filled with local salvaged treasures. Amanda also visits the largest reclamation yard in Andalusia to upcycle an old Spanish door into a statement dining table, but Alan fears she may have taken her upcycling too far and is bluntly honest with his friend

programme.title: Hell for Leather: The Story of Gaelic Football

programme.title: Rising Tides: Irelands Future in a Warmer World

After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit archaeological digs across the country, beginning with a look at the work being carried out in the west of Britain. The presenters visit Salisbury Museum, finding out about developments at sites including the enormous lost Welsh city of Trellech and Kents Cavern, a prehistoric cave where Britains earliest human remains have been found

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a mass produced series of paintings of crying children, a popular artwork in many houses in the 1980s

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Death shall come on swift wings to him who disturbs the peace of the King so the famous inscription goes. A mysterious curse haunts the original discoverers of Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner
programme.sub-title: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies
programme.desc: Scientists examine claims that ancient pharaohs used cocaine, and discover how members of a mountain tribe in Mexico can run hundreds of miles for days on end

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Satellites orbiting the planet spotlight Earths vast, unexplored areas of land and sea - revealing baffling new anomalies

programme.title: Battle 360
programme.desc: Experts reconstruct the struggle faced by American forces, led by the USS Enterprise, to reclaim the Marianas Islands from enemy forces

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: German Second World War fighter, the Messerschmitt Bf 109. Along with the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, it serves as the backbone of the Luftwaffes fighter force and had a key role in the Battle of Britain

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: The lost legacy of the Donner Party, a group of nearly 90 emigrants who left Illinois in the spring of 1846, heading westward to California in covered wagons. Delayed by a multitude of mishaps, they spent the next winter snowbound in the Sierra Nevada, with some resortinf to cannibalism to survive

programme.title: Rome: Rise and Fall of an Empire
programme.desc: How Constantine I became the first Christian Emperor, allowing the religion to spread through Europe and thus have a profound impact on the course of Western civilisation

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts examine the ruins left by ancient civilisations, including the Mayans, in the hope of finding evidence of extraterrestrial contact

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Investigating whether spiritual leaders known as shamans, who have healed and protected people throughout history really have contact with extraterrestrial realms

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: With science closer than ever to proving that life once lived on Mars, this programme examines whether there is a chance that something once exisited - or may still remain - there

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: The vast distances in space, and the prolonged amount of time it takes for communications to be transmitted and received between distant stars

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Death shall come on swift wings to him who disturbs the peace of the King so the famous inscription goes. A mysterious curse haunts the original discoverers of Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike kicks off his fifth year in business with the restoration of a rare 1971 International Scout II, before teaming up with his brothers to find a new home for their late fathers 1964 Mercury motor

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross is joined by maritime archaeologist Mallory Haas in Plymouth to deep dive on the wreck site of 36-gun Nelsonian frigate HMS Amethyst - a legendary battle cruiser, launched in 1799, which proved one of the most successful and prolific of the Napoleonic wars. Ross makes an incredible discovery using an underwater metal detector, and the historic item reveals why the ship was such a potent weapon of war, but also gives clues as to how and why it sank

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The actor travels dives even deeper on shipwrecks of major historical importance, exploring the remnants of some of the most significant moments in British history. He dives on shipwrecks around the British coastline to reveal some of the nations murkiest and best-kept secrets, beginning with the site of Britains most famous wreck - the Mary Rose. Ross is accompanied by dive master Neil Brock and tank expert and safety diver Mark Culwick

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists conduct a dig at Auckland Castle in Co Durham, which 700 years ago was home to a group of power-crazed bishops who behaved more like warriors than religious leaders. The experts head to Dirleton Castle in East Lothian to reveal the role one of the men played in defending England from William Wallaces army, and also try their hands at the art of stained glass-making, and fire a working trebuchet - the ultimate medieval weapon of war

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Guy Walters and Justine Ostrowska embark on a 4,000-kilometre journey across Europe, chasing legends of hidden Nazi treasure. From the mines of Germany and the Amber Room mysteries of Czechia, to stolen art in Austria, the Gold Train myths of Poland, bunker hunts in Italy, and the infamous waters of Lake Toplitz, their search combines discovery and eccentric encounters

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Roman Mystery and Waterloos Disappearing Dead
programme.desc: Alice Roberts meets an archaeology team in Lincoln who are looking for more evidence about a Roman occupation along a road that leaves the city. She also visits Norfolk to explore an Iron Age hillfort, discovering how 4th-century Romans used it despite being built in the Iron Age. At a small community dig in Lincolnshire, Alice learns about a newly found object - a Roman dodecahedron, and discusses its possible functions with a renowned expert in the digging tent

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Caddyshack (1980)
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael OKeefe and Rodney Dangerfield

programme.title: Hope Springs (2012)
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Carell

programme.title: The Estate (2022)
programme.desc: Two sisters attempt to win over their terminally ill, difficult-to-please aunt in the hope of becoming the beneficiaries of her wealthy estate, only to find the rest of their greedy family members have the same idea. Comedy, starring Toni Collette, Anna Faris, David Duchovny and Kathleen Turner

programme.title: Zoolander (2001)
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny

programme.title: Zoolander 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Dim-witted supermodels Derek Zoolander and Hansel McDonald must step back into the spotlight and save the day when a maniacal villain starts murdering some of the worlds most beautiful pop stars. Comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller and Owen Wilson, with Penelope Cruz, Will Ferrell and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughters wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan, Julie Walters, Colin Firth, Stellan Skarsgard and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous (2005)
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureaus publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns

programme.title: Superbad (2007)
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: Zoolander (2001)
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny

programme.title: American Pie (1999)
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Pie 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy

programme.title: Zoolander 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Dim-witted supermodels Derek Zoolander and Hansel McDonald must step back into the spotlight and save the day when a maniacal villain starts murdering some of the worlds most beautiful pop stars. Comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller and Owen Wilson, with Penelope Cruz, Will Ferrell and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Superbad (2007)
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: An American architect agrees to marry a Mexican photographer after she falls pregnant after their ill-advised one-night stand. However, they quickly discover the pitfalls of their decision as cultures clash and sparks begin to fly. Romantic comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Salma Hayek, Jon Tenney and Carlos Gomez

programme.title: Billy Madison (1995)
programme.desc: A lazy twentysomething lives off his wealthy hotel magnate father. When the old man decides to retire, he begins to question whether his layabout son is suitable to take over the family empire and issues a challenge - he must retake 12 years of school in 24 weeks, or lose everything. Comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Bridgette Wilson, Darren McGavin and Bradley Whitford.

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off (1986)
programme.desc: A teenager plays truant from school and spends the day dragging his girlfriend and a reluctant friend into all manner of crazy adventures in the big city - while the schools dean of students vows to stop at nothing to prove the youngster is faking illness. Comedy, starring Matthew Broderick, Mia Sara, Alan Ruck, Jennifer Grey, Jeffrey Jones and Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie (1995)
programme.desc: It is now the 1990s and the members of the sweet, all-American family face a testing time as their brash neighbours scheme to tear down the Brady home to make way for a shopping centre. Comedy, based on the 1970s TV sitcom, starring Shelley Long, Gary Cole, Christine Taylor and Christopher Daniel Barnes

programme.title: Paddington in Peru (2024)
programme.desc: The lovable bear, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his Aunt Lucy, embarking on a mysterious adventure. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective (1994)
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls (1995)
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. However, his unique investigative talents are tested to the limits as he faces a race against time to find the missing creature and prevent a tribal war. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey, Simon Callow and Bob Gunton

programme.title: American Pie (1999)
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding (2003)
programme.desc: The friends from East Great Falls High reunite to celebrate Jim and Michelles forthcoming wedding. Though reluctant to invite Stifler to their big day, the happy couple relent - but regret their decision when he plans a bachelor party on the same evening Jim is due to meet the in-laws. The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Reunion (2012)
programme.desc: Jim Levenstein and his old friends return to their home town for a high-school reunion. Struck by how much their lives have changed, they set out to relive the sexual misadventures of their adolescence, but only end up making bigger fools of themselves than they did as teenagers. Comedy sequel to the American Pie movies, starring Jason Biggs and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: The actor is joined by former Newcastle United striker Les Ferdinand for a short break in Northumberland, where the pair travel from Bamburgh to Seahouses on e-bikes

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen
programme.desc: Part one of two. Tonia Buxton travels to the island of Cyprus, where she learns how goats milk is used to make traditional halloumi cheese

programme.title: Hello Campers
programme.desc: Former bluecoat Mark Goddard gets to grips with sandwiches by the seaside, volleyball, bingo and karaoke as he takes a tour through the history of holiday camps. In the first episode, he meets a group of families whove taken their annual break at the same place in Norfolk for more than 30 years, and tries his hand at a traditional sport _ welly-wanging

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: This edition charts the exploits of Pat and Sue Willan, who now retired plan to buy their very last floating home, which they hope to keep moored on the Thames. They have enlisted the help of a boat-maker in Stoke and opted for a 35-tonne, 55-foot state-of-the-art, all-mod-cons Dutch barge. They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Alan Titchmarsh and his team transform a home and garden in Chester for retired couple Richard and Ann Price. The couple have fostered 20 children over the last ten years, and with such busy lives, their home and garden has had to take a back seat. Alan and the team re-configure the house and create a direct connection to a new country-style outdoor space

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Documentary following life at Highclere Castle, best known to Downton Abbey fans as the setting for the popular period drama, following Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their loyal staff as they strive to make this year the most profitable to date, with a busy calendar of events both home and away. Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans whove turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. Head butler Luis mans the drinks and ice-cream kiosk on one of the hottest days of spring, while head of visitor reception Paul prepares to display a precious family heirloom - a vintage 1936 Rolls-Royce

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill are in Ledbury to design an Italian courtyard garden that reminds Miranda and Andrew of their 25th wedding anniversary in Tuscany

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Garden makeover show, with Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull. In Port Sunlight, the Wirral, they turn Emma and Nathans scruffy cottage garden into a Balinese paradise. Having spent the pandemic indoors, they would love an outdoor escape - a tropical oasis, complete with lush planting and water feature

programme.title: Can You Keep it Up for a Week? (1974)
programme.desc: A workshy mans fiancee challenges him to hold down a steady job - a situation that puts him squarely in the path of temptation. Comedy, starring Richard OSullivan, Jeremy Bulloch, Neil Hallett and Jill Damas

programme.title: Permissive (1970)
programme.desc: A woman comes to London to visit an old friend, and gets drawn into the world of rock band groupies. She quickly sinks into a self-destructive hedonistic lifestyle, and is consumed with jealousy as she and rival groupies bitterly compete to outshine each other in the eyes of the musicians they cling to. Drama, starring Maggie Stride and Gay Singleton

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for a piece of a Formula 1 car driven by Ayrton Senna, a gold and platinum-plated Toyota Supra engine and a poster and ticket from a Sex Pistols tour that never happened. An ornate brass palm-tree light from the 1970s also goes up for sale

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey

programme.desc: Found murdered in a Seattle garage in July 1967, Susan Galvin remained without justice until 2018, when DNA and genetic genealogy identified her killer, Frank Wypych.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: Faria Khan hated her husband, Nawajid. Instead of divorce, she hired a group to execute a calculated, cold-blooded murder plot.

programme.title: Fraud Squad
programme.desc: A manager taking a gamble with an NHS credit card; and a dance troupe boss steals thousands of pounds.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: The case of Hannegret Donnelly, who secretly abused her husband for years. He was found dead with 78 injuries, exposing the systematic domestic cruelty.

programme.desc: Investigators turn to forensic evidence when CCTV footage of a convenience store murder proves too fuzzy to be of any use

programme.title: Facing Evil

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera

Simon Baker and his wife Rebecca Rigg star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: It seems money doesnt buy happiness when lottery winner Cherry is found dead at her luxurious villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. As usual, Neville and the team are presented with a real head-scratcher when it turns out no one was in the house at the time - and the mystery deepens when the victims body apparently vanishes into thin air. Meanwhile, JP is training unruly new officer Marlon, aware that his wife Rosey is due to give birth at any time. Kelvin Fletcher, Jason Manford and Faye McKeever guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A group of astronomers gathers on the cliffs of Saint Marie to watch Jupiter and Saturn align - a once-in-a-lifetime planetary event. However, one of its number - renowned professor Bertrand Sworder - meets an untimely death. The circumstances of his demise warrant the involvement of Neville and Naomi, who soon learn there was some professional hostility towards Sworder. Back at the station, Darlene announces that she has passed her exam and is ready to be a trainee officer. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Tahj Miles

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon introduces a seasonal special of the comedy panel game. Screen hardman Ray Winstone, comic Josh Widdicombe, maths whizz Rachel Riley and actor Ricky Tomlinson join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack to hoodwink their opponents with a few festive fibs or facts about themselves. Does one of the contestants really apologise to their boiled egg before smashing its head in? Who apparently writes Christmas cards with their feet? And did one of the line-up really prevent their bandmate joining the Beatles?

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chefs gastronomic road trip from Venice to Istanbul through the countries of the former Byzantine Empire is nearing its end as he leaves southern Greece for the shores of western Turkey. On the Cesme Peninsula Rick enjoys creamy Armola cheese matured in goat skins, Urlas famous red wine and the ultimate Turkish breakfast. He also cooks the countrys iconic dish sultans delight - a mouth-watering lamb stew on a bed of aubergine puree

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: 120 kilograms of cocaine are discovered in the axles of a lowboy trailer, and two men are caught attempting to smuggle a rooster for cock-fighting

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Packages of cocaine are found concealed in the chassis of a bus, officers receive a tip-off about a vehicle loaded with cartel cash, and a magician comes under scrutiny

programme.title: How Britain Worked
programme.desc: Guy Martin works on a machine that can be credited with helping to kick-start the Industrial Revolution. Joining a team from the Black Country Living Museum, he helps to restore a Newcomen engine - an 18th-century steam-powered device used principally to pump water out of mines. As the rotting timber structure is replaced, worn parts repaired, the boiler cleaned and crumbling brickwork rebuilt, the presenter also learns about the lives of the men, women and children who mined coal

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set out to discover if they can go motor racing for less than it costs to play golf. programme.title: Ill Get This
programme.desc: An eclectic mix of five celebrities go out for dinner together. When they arrive at the restaurant, they must place their bank card in the centre of the table. As the food is served and the drinks flow, they play a series of fun and revealing games, and if they win a game, they can retrieve their card. The person whose card remains at the end of the evening must pick up the bill for the whole group. Taking part in the first edition are Rylan Clark-Neal, Ed Gamble, Carol Vorderman, Ellie Taylor and Anton Du Beke

The person whose card remains at the end of the evening must pick up the bill for the whole group. Taking part in the first edition are Rylan Clark-Neal, Ed Gamble, Carol Vorderman, Ellie Taylor and Anton Du Beke

programme.title: Ill Get This
programme.desc: Tom Davis, Julian Clary, Laura Whitmore, Rachel Johnson and Chris Kamara meet at a restaurant for a fancy meal. The catch is theyll play games between courses and the loser will have to pay for everyones dinner

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried gives a friends daughter some experience in the surgery, and Calum is resentful until he sees the young student. Rural drama, starring Robert Hardy, Christopher Timothy and John McGlynn

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Following Brokenwoods first drum n bass festival, the van belonging to the band Starscraper suddenly explodes seemingly from the volume of the music it was playing

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey looks forward to mothering Garth, but his lack of enthusiasm puts Sharon in a difficult position. Meanwhile, Dorien discovers a lust for learning - and her new psychology lecturer. Comedy, starring Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Rickman innocently goes on a blind date with a good-looking City gent - who is later arrested for dabbling in drugs and tries to get himself off the hook by implicating her

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: An ex-girlfriend of Nicks turns up at the Mill, eager to turn the clock back. Vivien has a disastrous driving lesson when Eva comes along for the ride

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Daniel and Archie appreciate each others skills as they work together on the case of a man forced to revisit his troubled past, and Davey causes tension by flirting with Michelle in front of Ruth. Meanwhile, Julia worries when Nick and Melody have to reschedule their first evaluation. Christopher Coghill guest stars

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Diane brings Jack to work with her and is warned that she must choose between motherhood and her career. Her predicament is made a little easier when Owen offers to help in any way he can. Mubbs tries to make amends with Rosie, while Mickie and Donna settle their differences and Connie resorts to emotional blackmail to get her own way. Medical drama, starring Patricia Potter

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Kirsty shares a kiss with Adam, and considers leaving Warren - until a shocking discovery about his condition throws her future into turmoil. Lenny struggles to inform his sister of their bone marrow incompatibility, enlisting Yukis help in a desperate search for an alternative donor, while Jordan returns to the department and immediately clashes with Ruth over several of her new policies

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Rickman innocently goes on a blind date with a good-looking City gent - who is later arrested for dabbling in drugs and tries to get himself off the hook by implicating her

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Billie is determined to serve his country, but furious Carol has other ideas. Syed and Amiras windfall moves them away from Zainab, and Leon shows Zsa Zsa his romantic side

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Billie will not be budged on his plans to fight for Britain. Meanwhile, Amira unwittingly torments Zainab, and Danny plays Ronnie and Roxy off against each other

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: A retired sheepdog takes to rounding up cars, and James is challenged to a race. Rural drama based on the novels of James Herriot, starring Christopher Timothy, Peter Davison and Robert Hardy

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Jan has a confrontation with Ken over his plans to buy into her fashion business. Meanwhile, Charles and Gerald prepare for their trial

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: The case of a missing manuscript takes a dramatic turn when Frank and Lu find themselves trapped in famous author Greg Albans house, where no one is who they seem. Drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Darryl plots to spend a night with Tracey by escaping from hospital, while Sharon makes her own plans for the evenings entertainment. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg and Blamire try to encourage Compo to adopt a more spiritual outlook on life. Peter Sallis, Michael Bates and Bill Owen star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The Trio go on a field trip to a historical home, but end up baby-sitting for relatives of Compo

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo shocks everyone by making an effort to dress smartly in an attempt to woo a lady. Peter Sallis and Bill Owen star

programme.title: Death in Holy Orders
programme.desc: Part one of two. Commander Adam Dalgliesh investigates the case of a suspected serial killer and encounters greed and corruption, while also falling in love for the first time since the death of his wife. Thriller based on PD Jamess book, starring Martin Shaw, with Robert Hardy, Janie Dee and Jesse Spencer

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: A body is found, prompting two people to confess to murder. When tests show the corpse is more than 600 years old, the team must discover why the pair took responsibility for a crime they could not possibly have committed and if they are in fact the perpetrators of other killings. Alun Armstrong and James Bolam star

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. When a doorkeeper at the House of Lords is murdered, Lynley and Havers believe the victims gambling debts must have been the motive. When a clerk also dies, evidence of a wider conspiracy involving stolen papers is uncovered. The detectives locate the missing documents, but realise they are being followed and must catch the killer before someone beats them to it

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: A retired sheepdog takes to rounding up cars, and James is challenged to a race. Rural drama based on the novels of James Herriot, starring Christopher Timothy, Peter Davison and Robert Hardy

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Mike Shepherd and the team are called to the remote community of beaches at Pateke Point, where a local resident has been bludgeoned to death by an unknown blunt object and locked inside a house that is not her own. Detective drama, starring Neill Rea and Fern Sutherland

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon seems to be losing Chris and, more importantly, the ownership of the cafe. Meanwhile, Dorien has to choose between love and luxury. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: It is all work and little play for the Sun Hill officers as manpower is stepped up to deal with an anticipated rise in crime on the eve of the new millennium - when its likely a few over-enthusiastic revellers could see in the year 2000 behind bars

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: George helps a bickering couple realise how much they need each other when they are both struck down by serious illness. Nick refuses to re-arrange Melodys evaluation, and Michelle witnesses Daveys abusive treatment of Ruth

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Jimmi gets caught up in a difficult situation on a bus when passengers become suspicious of a Muslim boy who is pacing up and down muttering prayers. Michelle invites Ruth out for the evening, but the receptionist is hesitant until she learns Davey will be working late

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: A flamboyant new plastic surgeon joins the team, earning Wills disapproval almost immediately, and attempts to pay a shocked Tricia for helping him. Connie organises an evening of cricket as a team bonding exercise - but in her absence, Ric proposes they just get drunk instead and takes the opportunity to question Owen on his intentions toward Diane. Donna fails to pay the rent yet again, but this time Lisa has had enough and orders her out immediately

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Ruths plans for a good Christmas are threatened by the state of her marriage - and the arrival of Edwards ex-lover in the department only makes matters worse. Kirsty struggles to put aside her feelings for the sake of her professional relationship with Adam, while a homesick Mads is saddened to meet a woman who everyone believes has been dumped in the hospital for the festive period. Guest starring Lucy-Jo Hudson (Wild at Heart), Hollie-Jay Bowes (Hollyoaks), Jody Latham (Shameless) and James Midgley (Cutting It)

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Christian resolves to sort things out with Syed, as Carol begins to shift on the idea of Billie the soldier. Danny and Glenda plot to take the Mitchells for all theyve got

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Jack comes out of his coma to find his life will never be the same again. Amira enlists Christians help to save her marriage, and the mysteries of the fairer sex baffle Leon

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Television arrives in the Dales, and Siegfried thinks he is the ideal candidate to treat a dog with a weak heart. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy and Robert Hardy

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Charles vows to take revenge on Ken for trying to ruin him. Meanwhile, Jan and James successfully exhibit their clothing at a Maltese fashion show

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a suspicious death among a team of actors who offer Shakespeare for hire for any occasion, and soon discover there is more backstabbing and tragedy behind the scenes than there is in the performances

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey invites an old school friend to stay for a few days, leaving Sharon out in the cold. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg persuades Compo and Blamire to buy a car so they can get around more easily, but the old banger they end up with turns out to be more trouble than it is worth

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Inspired by a local art event, Blamire, Compo and Clegg decide to go camping and take some creative photographs of anything that interests them. Michael Bates, Bill Owen and Peter Sallis star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The residents are troubled by a bicycle, and Compos lucky rabbits foot causes even more problems, while Sid tries his best to avoid Ivy. Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Michael Bates star in the long-running comedy set in Yorkshire, from the pen of Roy Clarke

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: An Appetite for Murder: Part One
programme.desc: A popular but tempestuous celebrity chef is murdered during his cookbook launch and there is no shortage of suspects for Judith, Suzie and Becks.

programme.sub-title: An Appetite for Murder: Part Two
programme.desc: Police investigate the chefs death but a new development makes them rethink everything they have learned so far. Susan Lynch guest stars.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team reopens a 20-year-old case when a camera and film belonging to a photographic lab assistant murdered in 1987 are found by chance in a Soho pub toilet. New evidence leads the detectives into the world of modelling and to the door of a professional footballer. Meanwhile, Brians erratic behaviour takes an alarming turn, and Gerry is less than happy when his daughter Emily (played by Dennis Watermans real-life daughter Hannah) joins the team and looks to Sandra as a role model

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Lynley and Havers investigate a case at Smithfield Market when a frozen body is found on a meat truck. The victim is carrying a page of parchment written in Arabic and a counterfeit British passport. A number of suspects emerge, including a dealer in antiquities, a forger, and a surgeon who may have been selling human organs. With Nathaniel Parker, Sharon Small and Mark Benton

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Bank Holiday Monday sees the Essex contingent arrive for a sunny day at the beach in Barry. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden and Ruth Jones star

programme.desc: Tony feels depressed thanks to his ever-expanding waistline and Garys secret stash of cash. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.desc: Toby has a problem with one of his patients, while Tom cannot afford the house he wants and has difficulty with an insurance medical. Nigel Havers and Tony Britton star

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Marlene allows Boycie to buy a maximum of six cows for the farm - and is less than impressed when Elgin, Jed and Bryan turn up with a herd of 300. programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Richard finds time weighing heavily on his hands, so Hyacinth decides to provide him with a hobby - a move that backfires on her in spectacular fashion. Comedy, starring Patricia Routledge, Clive Swift and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie struggles to come to terms with the news that his prize bull is gay, and Marlene finds she is missing the noise of the city after suffering sleepless nights. Tyler is delighted to learn he has failed all but two of his GCSEs, thinking he will no longer be accepted at a private school - but his parents have other ideas. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Are You Being Served?

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Second Stag Night of Doggy Wilkinson
programme.desc: Eric Sykes guest stars as absent-minded Doggy, who is disappointed when his stag night fails to live up to his expectations. However, Clegg, Truly, Alvin and Entwistle come up with a solution and soon rectify the situation. With Peter Sallis, Frank Thornton and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: An innocuous section of woodland soon becomes a legendary site renowned for its ghostly activity, due to the inventive rumours put about by Alvin, Truly and Clegg. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Frank Thornton and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.sub-title: Come In, Your Time Is Up
programme.desc: The platoon attempts to bring ashore three German airmen who have bailed out and landed in a lake and intend to stay in their dinghy until nightfall. Pike suggests they shoot through the vessel and sink them, but Captain Mainwaring is all for fair play - until Warden Hodges gets in on the act. Classic comedy first shown in 1975, starring Arthur Lowe and Ian Lavender
